true_header: Waiver of any provision of this agreement must be made in writing.
This agreement shall have a term of three (3) years.
“agreement” means this agreement and all amendments thereof;
“disclosing party” means the party disclosing confidential information;
“receiving party” means the party receiving confidential information;
Unless inconsistent with the context, an expression which denotes –
Any one gender includes the other gender;
Natural person includes a juristic person, partnership,
The singular includes the plural and vice versa .
Where figures are referred to in numerals and in words,
The rule of construction that, in the event of ambiguity,
Client is a company which provides ……………… .
Afrigis  is a  company  which  offers geographical data,
The parties are currently engaged in proprietary discussions pertaining to …………………………...
This agreement shall also bind the parties, notwithstanding the signature date,
The receiving party acknowledges that the confidential  information is a valuable,
The receiving party agrees that it will,
To be proprietary to the disclosing party; and
Restrictions on disclosure and use of the confidential information
That for which it is disclosed;
In accordance with the provisions of this agreement; and
In accordance with applicable data privacy legislation, as amended from time to time.
Return of material containing or pertaining to the confidential information
The disclosing party may, at any time,
As an alternative to the return of the material contemplated in clause 7.
The receiving party shall comply with a request in terms of this clause,
The parties irrevocably agree that the decision in any arbitration proceedings –
Will be binding on all of them;
Will forthwith be carried into effect;
May be made an order of any court of competent jurisdiction.
If delivered by hand during business hours,
If sent by e-mail during business hours,
Subject to the provisions of this agreement,
This agreement may be signed in one or more counterparts,
No party shall be bound by any express or implied term, representation, warranty,
Unless otherwise stipulated in this agreement, no addition to,

Was available to the public at the time of disclosure,
Is used or disclosed by recipient with discloser ’s prior written approval;

Use of confidential information recipient may only use the confidential information for the purpose of type of purpose/or a research collaboration and not for any commercial purpose (‘ permitted purpose ’). recipient must not use the confidential information for any other purpose without the prior written approval of discloser.
